subject: Verify all 9 protocols work E2E with JSON output
description:
Final verification that all protocols work correctly:

**Test each protocol with appropriate input:**

1. mapper - Go files → JSON with entry_points
2. architect - Module files → JSON with -o json
3. debugger - Error + source → JSON with root_cause
4. deps - Source files → JSON with internal_deps
5. api-surface - Public files → JSON with public_functions
6. memory-audit - Memory files → Markdown report
7. memory-drift - Recent memory → JSON score
8. benchmark-score - Benchmark data → JSON score
9. benchmark-audit - Full data → Markdown report

**Success criteria:**
- All fast protocols (mapper, deps, api-surface, memory-drift, benchmark-score) use Flash model
- All complex protocols (architect, debugger, memory-audit, benchmark-audit) use Pro model
- -o json flag works for ALL protocols
- Large input (50KB+) works reliably (NO RACE CONDITION)
- Timeout handling works (test with -t 1)

Mark GEMINI-SLAVE-DEBUG-SUMMARY.md as RESOLVED when complete.
